leadText: Sacred Plaza (Japanese: 祈りの広場 Prayer Plaza) is an area located in the western region of the Coronet Highlands of Hisui. It is located east of Moonview Arena, west of Celestica Ruins, north of Stonetooth Rows, and south of Cloudcap Pass. The Summit Camp becomes permanently established between here and Moonview Arena as part of Mission 17: "Atop Mount Coronet".

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The Sacred Plaza is a multi-leveled set of wide cliffs that acts a junction for multiple areas near the summit of Mount Coronet . The uppermost level is vast and flat and acts as a spacer between the Celestica Ruins and the entrance to the Moonview Arena. A thin mountain ridge divides the Stonetooth Rows with the other two lower levels of the Sacred Plaza to the east. The middlemost level is a forested strip of land with some Berry trees . The lowermost level of the area has four tall stone formations that plateau at the top. The terrain here is rugged yet not completely barren. The flora of this area is characterized by dark green trees and shrubs.
